quoted_text:
EVs Reality Check in Canada. 

Canada Zero Emission Vehicle Apr sales were 9.7% of total car sales, down from 12.% in Mar. And nowhere near the prior Liberals regulated 2026 target of 20%.

My👇table, I calculated $k/unit price and % ZEV sales of total sales lines to @StatCan_eng 06/12 release.

ZEVs. 9.7% of total car sales.  Ave price (believe net of any tax credits) was $65k but still ~14% higher than $57k for all other fuel types.  

#oott

text: Trump comments on Iran and Strait #oott
quoted_text:
"You close it and you won't have a country." President Trump said he told Iranian officials about the Strait of Hormuz. "You won't even make it back to your fu*king country."

"We may take over the Strait, if we have to," Trump said. "If they don't make a deal, we'll collect tolls."

Trump added the U.S. could become the "Guardian Angel" of the Strait, and take 20% of the oil.

Iran calls the threats a violation of the June 18th Memorandum of Understanding, which bars the use of threat or force.

quoted_text: The Iranian delegation will not return to negotiations in Switzerland unless U.S. President Trump apologizes for his threats and Israel withdraws from southern Lebanon, pro-Hezbollah Al-Mayadeen reports. Iran’s state media confirms the Iranians have left the negotiation venue.
